description: Lore plugin hooks — enforce lore_write usage and prompt for domain knowledge corrections

hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'lore/(concepts|entities|rules|roles|decisions|glossary|sources)/.*\.md$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not write lore entry files directly with Write/Edit. Use the lore_write MCP tool instead — it maintains the operations log and index.' >&2; exit 2; fi
echo 'Were any domain assumptions wrong in this session? If yes, I\'ll update the lore.'
